extension.description: Adds Adobe Photoshop launch integration to DayZ PAA Preview. Separately installed Photoshop and a compatible third-party PAA plug-in are required.
configuration.title: DayZ PAA Creative Bridge
configuration.photoshopPath: Optional absolute path to **Photoshop.exe**. Leave empty for automatic discovery. Adobe Photoshop and a compatible third-party PAA format plug-in must be installed separately.
